product-manager.description: Turns external requirements into a feature brief with scope, flows, and acceptance criteria, and coordinates the cross-role workflow to completion.

chief-tech-lead.description: Owns high-level system design and cross-end contracts, defines architecture and error models, and plans vertical slices with test gates.

frontend-tech-lead.description: Creates frontend low-level design from the HLD and contracts, defines internal boundaries for parallel delivery, and specifies frontend test strategy.

frontend-developer.description: Implements frontend features from approved LLD and contracts, adds FE tests, updates runbook docs, and updates design docs before deviating from LLD.

backend-tech-lead.description: Creates backend low-level design from the HLD and contracts, defines module boundaries for parallel delivery, and specifies backend test strategy.

backend-developer.description: Implements backend APIs and domain logic from approved LLD and contracts, adds BE tests, updates runbook docs, and updates design docs before deviating from LLD.

qa.description: Owns cross-end E2E and regression testing, validates critical user journeys against contracts, and feeds failures back with minimal repro steps.
